3:05 P.M. JURY ROOM, DAVID CAIN, JUDGE PRO TEM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. STIPULATION REACHED. TERMS: PLTF. TO RECOVER POSSESSION OF PREMISES LOCATED AT 580 HAIGHT STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. DEFT. TO PAY $1,900.00 RENTS & DAMAGES. IF DEFTS. PAY $300.00 MONEY ORDER OR CASHIERS CHECK BY 5 PM ON OR BEFORE 10/29/93, ENTRY OF JUDGMENT WILL STAY UNTIL MIDNIGHT OF 11/15/93. DEFTS. TO VACATE BROOM CLEAN & TO REMOVE ALL PERSONAL PROPERTIES, OTHERWISE ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON THE FOLLOWING DAY.
